author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
27 Hidden Secrets in Disney Adventure World | Disneyland Paris
Step into Disney Adventure World, the newly reimagined second park at Disneyland Paris, and uncover hidden Easter eggs and Imagineering details throughout. 🏰✨

Start in World Premiere, modeled after the original Disney Animation Studios in Burbank, then make your way to La Place de Rémy, home to a Ratatouille-inspired fountain featuring a hidden Remy zoetrope

Continue into World of Frozen and twirl through the village below the clock tower, where Anna and Hans sang “Love Is an Open Door,” then step inside the Frozen Ever After queue to spot even more hidden details ❄️

SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ

author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Take a walk with us through Liberty Square 🇺🇸 #DisneyCelebratesAmerica
SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ

About Walt Disney World:
At Walt Disney World, you've got a whole fantastic world to celebrate in! With four spectacular theme parks and two water parks plus the most amazing shopping, dining, and recreation magic imaginable, it's no wonder all of life's special moments are made even more enjoyable when you celebrate at Walt Disney World.
